greenwich.notes: From 2019 to Oct. 2022, the weather station was a remote Davis Vantage Pro 2. On Oct. 26, 2022 it was replaced by the current setup. On April 11, 2023 the Temperature sensor was replaced by a Temp/RH sensor.

north_rustico.notes: Initially installed by CBCL (Don Jardine) with a HOBO MicroRX 2104 Water level Station. The tidal sensor was reinstalled at a different location by PEINP on August 26, 2022. On April 14 it was replaced by the current setup.

tracadie.notes: Initially installed by CBCL (Don Jardine) with a Solinst Levelogger 5, model 3001, LT M10. The tidal sensor was reinstalled at a different location by PEINP on June 24, 2022. On July 14, 2023 it was replaced by the current setup. On Sept. 1st, 2023 the water sensor was installed.

stanley_bridge.notes: Initially installed by PEINP with a Solinst Levelogger 5, model 3001, LT M10. On July 25, 2023 it was replaced by the current setup. On February 19 2024 the water sensor was installed.
